name: HMS Ouse (T 80)
events: 7 Sep 1939 During 7 and 8 September 1939, HMS Otway (Cdr. H.R. Conway, RN), conducted exercises off Malta togerther with HMS Ouse. These included night exercises. (1)
14 Sep 1939 HMS Oswald (Lt.Cdr. G.M. Sladen, RN) conducted exercises off Malta together with HMS Ouse. (2)
14 Dec 1939 HMS Otway (Cdr. H.R. Conway, RN) conducted exercises off Malta together with HMS Ouse and HMS Coral. (3)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
